roa.docketEntryComment: REVOKE PROBATION
REVOKE PROBATION
ADV DEPORT CLAUSE;CT1-SP3Y(M)/ESS;3YPROB;PJ1Y;MAY DO 6M RESID DRG PROGIF PROG NOT COMPL;NO CTS;DTC;W/SVFI;SA2;MARY RODRIGUEZ;PC;PSR;STAY OF SURR TO 2/15/94;9AM;S24
/THE CAUSE IS ORDERED TRANSFERRED TO JUDGE LUCY KELLY MCCABE,///DEPARTMENT 24, FORTHWITH,//SA2:MAR RODRIGUEZ//CNT01:01452173

VTN INT SW-PHAN/K;MO W/D PLEA NG GRTD;ADV/PERS WVS CONSTL/CITIZ RTSPLD G CT1-212,5(B)PC/F;CRT MKES FNDGS/ACCEPTS PLEA;REF APD/PSRCONT 1/14/94 AT 9AM IN S22 FOR SENT;DEFT WVD TIME;ARBUCKLE RTSVAC 1/3/94 TRL DATE
MO CONT PURS 1050P-GRTD;VTN INT SW-H/HA;DEFT PERS ENT GEN TIME WAIVERVACATE 9/13/93 TRL DATE;S/A MAY RODRIGUEZ;CONT 9/22/93 1030AM FOR PTC-D22CONT 10/25/93 FOR TRIAL IN D22 AT 930AM
VTN INT SW-G/TRAUN;DEFT TO REPORT TO PROB F/W
DEFT ORD TO RPT TO SOLIDARITY HSE ON 2/18/94 TO SERVE AT LEAST 6M IN PROG35D CTS WVD FOR PURPOSE OF ENTERING PROG ONLY
VIETN INT SWN-CONG PHAM;DEFT ADV PERS/WVS CONSTL RTS;PLED G 212,5(B)PC
TRANSF TO D27 FOR PTC F/W
CONT 12/10/93 FOR PTC AT 1030AM IN D22
VTN INT SW-H/PHAM;MO SUB CNSL-GRTD;DEFT WVD TIME GENCONT 12/3/93 1030AM FOR PTC AND 1/3/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
VTN INT SW-HA/H;DEEMED PRETRIED
VTN INT SW WVD FOR THIS HRG ONLY;CONT 9/24/93 AT 9AM IN S28 FOR FUR PTC
TRANSF TO S28 FOR PTC F/W
VTN INT SW-H/PHAM;JOSE UMALI APPTD AS CNSL
BAIL REDUCE TO $10000;VTN INT SW-L/MUSFELT
VTN INT SW-HONG/HA;PD APPTD;ARRD;NG PLEA ENTEREDCONT TO 8/31/93 AT 1030AM FOR PTC AND 9/13/93 FOR TRIAL ON DEPT 22
O/C
